meta.title: MindState: Custom Beats & Noise
meta.description: Design multi-layer sound mixes with binaural, monaural, and isochronic beats, noise, ambient effects, and audio clips. 33 included mixes, Quick and Full editors, QR sharing, and Daily Rituals.

hero.headline: Support your brain potential
hero.subtitle: Discover custom-made beats and sounds that can help you relax, focus, meditate, unleash your creativity, enjoy deeper sleep, reduce tinnitus, and cultivate happy vibes. This is your go-to app for mental wellness.
hero.tagline: Available on Android with professional audio quality. Free to try.

features.title: Top Features
features.subtitle: Professional tools for focus, relaxation, sleep, meditation, and creativity.

feature1.title: Quick Editor and Full Editor
feature1.description: Quick editor: up to four tone, noise, effect, or file slots with live preview and beat picker. Full editor: unlimited tracks, volume envelopes, noise automation, and categorized add-track types. Switch between editors without losing work.

feature2.title: Multi-Layer Mixing
feature2.description: Combine binaural, monaural, and isochronic beats; white, pink, brown, green, and colored noise; ambient effects (rain, ocean, wind, fan, waterfall, old record); and timed MP3, WAV, or FLAC clips, each with independent volume.

feature3.title: 33 Included Mixes
feature3.description: Curated mixes across Sleep, Focus, Meditation, Relaxation, Creativity, Mood, Study, and Relaxed kid. 17 free to play; 16 extended mixes with a Starter subscription. Duplicate any included mix to customize.

feature4.title: QR Code and Link Sharing
feature4.description: Encode mixes as mindstate:// URLs. Scan, preview, edit, and save. Branded QR with logo on a white background. Share links carry mix structure only (custom art and imported audio files are not included).

feature5.title: Daily Rituals
feature5.description: Schedule a mix by time and repeat days. Create a ritual from the player toolbar or the Rituals screen. Opens the main player with lock-screen transport when it is time to listen.

feature6.title: Professional Native Audio
feature6.description: Rust real-time synthesis with phase-continuous tones, smooth glides, and anti-click stream fade. Lock-screen play, pause, and seek, headset Smart Pause, and category-themed mix artwork.

features.pitch: Unlike preset-only wellness apps, MindState gives you professional control over every layer, frequency, and volume envelope, or start from 33 included mixes across nine categories. Share mixes via QR code, schedule Daily Rituals, and listen with lock-screen controls and native audio quality powered by a Rust synthesis engine.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Browse, build, tune, save, and listen in five steps

step1.title: Browse or Create
step1.description: Start from included mixes or a blank Quick or Full editor.

step2.title: Add Layers
step2.description: Add tones, noise, ambient effects, or your audio files. Pick types from illustrated chips in the Full editor add-track sheet.

step3.title: Tune
step3.description: Set carrier and beat frequencies, Solfeggio carriers, and volumes. Shape envelopes and noise automation in the Full editor.

step4.title: Preview and Save
step4.description: Live preview while editing. Save custom mixes to My mixes with a Starter subscription.

step5.title: Listen, Share, Schedule
step5.description: Play with lock-screen controls, share via QR or link, and optionally schedule a Daily Ritual.

aboutBinauralBeats.heroSubtitle: Custom Beats & Noises to Relax, Focus, Meditate, Be Creative & Sleep Better

benefits.title: Backed by science. Designed for your mind.

benefit1.title: Deep Relaxation & Stress Relief
benefit1.description: Achieve profound relaxation and melt away stress. Calming noise and binaural beats, paired with isochronic tones or solfeggio frequencies, help your brain enter deeply relaxed states, reducing anxiety and promoting calm.

benefit2.title: Enhanced Focus & Concentration
benefit2.description: Boost your cognitive performance and maintain laser-sharp focus. Isochronic tones and solfeggio frequencies, layered with binaural beats or background noise, support optimal states for work, study, and creative tasks.

benefit3.title: Better Sleep Quality
benefit3.description: Improve your sleep naturally. Solfeggio frequencies and soothing noise, combined with binaural beats or isochronic tones, support your brain's transition into deep, restorative sleep for better rest and recovery.

benefit4.title: Meditation Enhancement
benefit4.description: Unlock deeper meditation states and enhance your practice. Binaural beats and isochronic tones, optionally with solfeggio or gentle noise, can help you reach deeper mindfulness more easily.

benefit5.title: Creativity & Flow States
benefit5.description: Access your creative potential and enter flow states. Build mixes from solfeggio frequencies, binaural beats, layered noise, or isochronic tones to support enhanced creativity, problem-solving, and peak performance.

benefit6.title: Mood Improvement
benefit6.description: Elevate your mood and emotional well-being. Various noise types, isochronic tones, binaural beats, and solfeggio frequencies can be combined in custom mixes to help improve mood, reduce negative emotions, and promote positive mental states.

howItWorks.title: How Brainwave Entrainment Works
howItWorks.subtitle: The science behind the transformation
howItWorks.explanation: Brainwave entrainment is how rhythmic sound can influence your brain's electrical activity. One method is binaural beats: when you listen to two slightly different frequencies (one in each ear), your brain perceives a third frequency, the difference between them, and may synchronize to it. Isochronic tones (evenly spaced pulses of a single tone) and monaural beats (two frequencies mixed before they reach your ears) work similarly and can entrain brainwaves through speakers (no headphones required). Beyond beats and tones, noise types such as white, pink, brown, green, and colored noise can support focus and relaxation by masking distractions and helping to optimize arousal levels, making them a valuable part of audio therapy.
howItWorks.noHeadphones: Monaural beats and isochronic tones effectively entrain brainwaves when played through speakers, so you can enjoy the benefits during meditation, work, or sleep without headphones.
howItWorks.personalization: Different beat frequencies are linked to different mental states: Delta (0.5-4 Hz) for deep sleep, Theta (4-8 Hz) for meditation and creativity, Alpha (8-13 Hz) for relaxed focus, Beta (13-30 Hz) for active concentration, and Gamma (30-100 Hz) for peak performance. By combining beats, tones, and noise and matching them to your sensitivity and goals, you can tailor mixes for maximum benefit.

adhdNoise.title: White & Pink Noise for AD/HD Focus
adhdNoise.subtitle: Research shows noise can help improve attention and reduce impulsivity in people with AD/HD
adhdNoise.description: A meta-analysis of 13 studies with 335 participants found that white and pink noise led to small but statistically significant improvements in task performance for children and young adults with AD/HD. Benefits included less impulsivity, better attention, and fewer errors. Interestingly, these noise types helped people with AD/HD but not those without, suggesting they work by optimizing brain arousal levels specifically for AD/HD brains.

adhdBinaural.title: Binaural Beats for AD/HD Symptoms
adhdBinaural.subtitle: Pilot studies show promise for attention and homework-related improvements
adhdBinaural.description: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled pilot study with 20 children and adolescents with AD/HD found that listening to binaural beats (20 minutes, 3 times per week for 3 weeks) led to significant improvements reported by parents. While objective attention tests didn't show significant changes, parents reported fewer homework problems related to inattention, suggesting real-world benefits for daily functioning.

safety.title: Safe & Well-Studied
safety.subtitle: Binaural beats are generally safe for most people when used responsibly
safety.general: Binaural beats have been studied for decades and are considered safe for the majority of users. They work through natural brainwave entrainment and don't require any invasive procedures or substances.
safety.precautions: If you have epilepsy or a history of seizures, consult with a healthcare provider before use. Keep volume at comfortable levels. Excessive volume can cause hearing damage. If you experience any discomfort, discontinue use. Binaural beats are not a replacement for medical treatment or professional mental health care.

research.title: Backed by Research
research.subtitle: Scientific studies support the benefits of binaural beats and brainwave entrainment
research.findings: Research has shown that binaural beats can help reduce anxiety, improve focus, enhance meditation practice, and support better sleep. Studies have found positive effects on relaxation, stress reduction, and cognitive performance. While individual results may vary, the scientific evidence continues to grow, supporting the use of binaural beats as a tool for mental enhancement and well-being.

adhdNoise.title: AD/HD & White/Pink Noise Meta-Analysis
adhdNoise.description: A meta-analysis of 13 studies (335 participants) found white and pink noise led to small but statistically significant improvements in attention, reduced impulsivity, and fewer errors in children and young adults with AD/HD.

adhdBinaural.title: AD/HD Binaural Beats Pilot Study
adhdBinaural.description: A randomized controlled trial with 20 AD/HD children/adolescents found that binaural beats (20 min, 3×/week for 3 weeks) led to parents reporting significantly fewer homework problems related to inattention.

metaAnalysis.title: Meta-Analysis: Cognition, Anxiety & Pain
metaAnalysis.description: A comprehensive analysis of 22 studies found medium, significant effects on memory, attention, anxiety, and pain perception (effect size g = 0.45).

anxiety.title: Anxiety & Quality of Life Study
anxiety.description: Daily exposure to delta-frequency binaural beats over 60 days showed significant decreases in trait anxiety and increases in quality of life.

memory.title: Memory Enhancement Research
memory.description: Research found that alpha, beta, and gamma binaural beats can modulate cortical networks and improve short-term memory performance.

tinnitus.title: Tinnitus Management Study
tinnitus.description: A randomized controlled trial found that alpha-frequency binaural beats combined with music therapy led to significant improvements in chronic tinnitus.

quotes.title: What Research Says
quotes.subtitle: Scientific studies support the benefits of brainwave entrainment

quote1.text: The group who listened to binaural beats experienced an increase in parasympathetic activity, reporting higher levels of relaxation.

quote2.text: By the end of the study, participants reported an overall decrease in disturbance, tension, anxiety, confusion, and fatigue. What's more, there was an increase in self-reported quality of life.

quote3.text: Binaural beats could induce the brain signals required for sleep, potentially increasing the quality of sleep.

quote4.text: Potential binaural beats benefits include: reduced anxiety and stress, improved mood, increased focus and concentration, increased creativity, improved sleep habits, better pain management.

quote5.text: Listening to them can help with cognitive functioning, as they are the brainwaves that are most involved in your executive functioning.

quote6.text: Binaural beats may be helpful in enhancing training and learning.

quote7.text: Electroencephalography (EEG) studies have demonstrated that exposure to binaural beats can synchronize brainwave patterns, leading to states of enhanced relaxation and altered states of consciousness.

quote8.text: Isochronic tones may help your brain sync with a specific auditory pattern that could ease things like anxiety.

quote9.text: Parents reported fewer homework problems related to inattention after their children with AD/HD listened to binaural beats regularly.

quote10.text: White and pink noise led to small but statistically significant improvements in attention, reduced impulsivity, and fewer errors in children and young adults with AD/HD.

rituals.title: Daily Rituals

rituals.bullet1: Create a ritual from the Rituals screen or the player toolbar when subscribed.

rituals.bullet4: iOS uses local notifications. Rituals reschedule when you travel across time zones.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What audio files can I import?
faq.a1: MP3, WAV, and FLAC from device storage or bundled and sample-pack assets.
faq.q2: Do QR codes include my custom audio?
faq.a2: No. QR and share links include mix structure (tones, noise, effects) only. Re-attach file tracks after import.
faq.q3: How do Daily Rituals work on Android?
faq.a3: Alarms and notifications. Grant exact-alarm, battery, and notification permissions when prompted. Optional Do Not Disturb access lets playback continue during DND.
faq.q4: How do Daily Rituals work on iOS?
faq.a4: Local notifications. Tap the alert to open MindState and play the scheduled mix.
faq.q5: Can I start a ritual from a mix I am playing?
faq.a5: Yes. Use Create ritual on the player toolbar when subscribed.
